label: Playback
heading: Hear it the way it was meant to be heard
description: Gapless playback for seamless album listening. Crossfading from 0 to 10 seconds between tracks. Native codec support for audio and video files — no transcoding, no plugins.
items: Audio & video playback with native codecs
screenshotAlt: Viboplr playback controls and now playing bar

label: Home
heading: A home screen that knows your library
description: Open Viboplr to a curated landing page — an auto-rotating carousel of radio stations built from your own music, plus shelves that resurface recent plays, your most-played, and albums you'd forgotten you owned.
items: Radio-station carousel seeded from your library
Extra shelves contributed by pluginsplugin
screenshotAlt: Viboplr home view with radio stations and shelves

label: Now Playing
heading: Lean back and watch the words
description: A full-screen now-playing view with synced, karaoke-style lyrics that highlight line by line. Playing a video? It expands into a theater mode with an ambient glow sampled from the artwork.
items: Video theater mode with ambient glow
screenshotAlt: Viboplr now playing lean-back view with album art

label: Library
heading: Your collection, always in sync
description: Point Viboplr at your music folders and it handles the rest. Background scanning reads metadata intelligently, and real-time file watching catches every change the moment it happens.
items: Smart metadata extraction with fallback parsing
Real-time file watching for instant updates
screenshotAlt: Viboplr library view with artist detail

label: Search
heading: Find anything in milliseconds
description: FTS5-powered full-text search across artists, albums, tracks, and tags. Accent-insensitive and forgiving — find what you want even when you can't remember the exact spelling.
items: Search by artist, album, track, or tag

label: Radio
heading: Rediscover your own music
description: Start an endless station from any track, artist, or tag and Viboplr builds the queue from what fits. When a queue runs dry, auto-continue keeps the music going using weighted strategies you control.
items: One-click radio from any track, artist, or tag
Mix by same artist, tag, most-played, or liked
Similar tracks, artists & bios via Last.fmplugin
screenshotAlt: Viboplr track detail view with metadata

label: Servers
heading: Local meets streaming, seamlessly
description: Point Viboplr at local folders and Subsonic or Navidrome servers for one unified library. Add streaming services through plugins — they slot straight into the same player, queue, and search.
items: Spotify & YouTube browse and playbackplugin
screenshotAlt: Viboplr collections view with local and server sources

label: Mini Player
heading: Always within reach
description: A compact, always-on-top mini player that stays visible while you work. Draggable, auto-resizing, and just the right amount of information at a glance.

label: Keyboard
heading: Built for power users
description: Over 35 keyboard shortcuts for everything from playback to navigation. Never leave the keyboard — control your music as fast as you can think.

label: Skins
heading: Make it yours
description: Choose from 8 built-in skins or install community skins from the gallery. Import your own JSON skin files with 13 customizable color tokens and optional custom CSS.
items: 13 color tokens for full UI theming
screenshotAlt: Viboplr skin settings with theme options

label: Plugins
heading: Extend it your way
description: A JavaScript plugin system powers streaming, lyrics, artwork, scrobbling, and downloads. Built-in plugins ship with the app; install more from the in-app gallery, or build your own with custom views, home shelves, context-menu actions, and event hooks.
items: One-click install from the in-app gallery
Custom sidebar views, home shelves & context actions
Per-plugin storage; structured views (no raw HTML)
